products.name: mSwasth
products.shortDescription: Comprehensive health insurance that covers hospitalisation, surgeries, and medical expenses up to ₹1,00,000.
products.description:
Health insurance plan designed to provide financial protection against medical expenses. It covers hospitalisation costs, surgical procedures, pre and post-hospitalisation expenses, and day-care treatments. With mSwasth, you get cashless treatment at network hospitals across India, ensuring peace of mind for you and your family.

Key Benefits:

• Cashless hospitalisation at 5000+ network hospitals
• Coverage for pre and post-hospitalisation expenses
• Day-care procedure coverage
• No medical check-up required for enrollment
• Easy claim settlement process
• 24/7 customer support

products.name: Mobile Damage Protection
products.shortDescription: Protect your smartphone against accidental damage, screen breakage, and theft with coverage up to ₹15,000.
products.description:
Mobile Damage Protection provides comprehensive coverage for your smartphone against unexpected damages and incidents.

Key Benefits:
• Accidental damage coverage
• Screen breakage protection
• Theft protection
• Coverage up to ₹15,000
• Easy claim process
• Pan-India service network

Perfect for smartphone users who want peace of mind against accidental damage and theft.

products.name: Cyber Protection
products.shortDescription: Secure your digital life against identity theft, online fraud, and cyber bullying with coverage up to ₹50,000.
products.description:
Cyber Protection insurance safeguards you against the growing threats of the digital world.

Key Benefits:
• Identity theft coverage
• Online fraud protection
• Cyber bullying coverage
• Coverage up to ₹50,000
• Legal expense coverage
• 24/7 cyber helpline

In today's digital age, this plan provides essential protection against cyber threats and online fraud.

products.name: Personal Accident Cover
products.shortDescription: Financial protection against accidental injuries, disability, and death with coverage up to ₹2,00,000.
products.description:
Personal Accident Cover provides financial protection to you and your family in case of accidental injuries.

Key Benefits:
• Accidental death benefit
• Permanent disability coverage
• Temporary disability coverage
• Coverage up to ₹2,00,000
• No medical check-up required
• Instant policy issuance

This plan ensures your family's financial security in case of unfortunate accidents.

products.name: Hospicash
products.shortDescription: Daily cash benefit during hospitalisation to cover incidental expenses up to ₹500/day.
products.description:
Hospicash provides daily cash benefits during hospitalisation to help cover incidental and out-of-pocket expenses.

Key Benefits:
• Daily cash benefit up to ₹500/day
• No bills or receipts required
• Covers incidental expenses
• Complements existing health insurance
• Easy claim process

Hospicash acts as a supplement to your existing health insurance by providing daily cash during hospital stays.

products.name: Fire & Burglary Insurance
products.shortDescription: Protect your home and belongings against fire, burglary, and natural disasters with coverage up to ₹5,00,000.
products.description:
Fire & Burglary Insurance provides comprehensive protection for your home and valuable belongings.

Key Benefits:
• Fire and allied perils coverage
• Burglary and theft protection
• Natural disaster coverage
• Coverage up to ₹5,00,000
• Personal belongings coverage
• Easy and fast claim settlement

Secure your home and possessions against unforeseen events with this comprehensive insurance plan.

products.name: Two Wheeler Insurance
products.shortDescription: Comprehensive two-wheeler insurance that covers accidents, theft, and third-party liabilities.
products.description:
Two Wheeler Insurance provides financial protection for motorcycles and scooters against risks such as accidents, theft, natural disasters, and third party liabilities. It not only helps you meet legal requirements but also reduces out of pocket expenses arising from unexpected damages, repairs, or losses. Policies can be purchased as Third Party Only or Comprehensive Cover for wider protection.

Key Benefits:

• Mandatory Legal Coverage - Third party insurance is compulsory under Indian motor vehicle law.
• Accident & Damage Protection - Covers repair costs for damages to your two wheeler caused by accidents or collisions.
• Third Party Liability Cover - Protects you from financial liability arising from injury, death, or property damage to third parties.
• Theft & Fire Protection - Provides compensation if your vehicle is stolen or damaged due to fire or explosion.
• Natural & Man Made Calamity Coverage - Covers losses due to floods, earthquakes, storms, riots, or vandalism.
• Personal Accident Cover - Offers financial support in case of death or permanent disability of the owner rider.
• Add On Covers for Extra Safety - Options include Zero Depreciation, Roadside Assistance, Engine Protection, and NCB Protection.
• Cashless Repair Facility - Enables hassle free repairs at network garages without immediate payment.

products.name: Four Wheeler Insurance
products.shortDescription: Comprehensive four-wheeler insurance that covers accidents, theft, and third-party liabilities.
products.description:
Four Wheeler Insurance provides financial protection for your car against risks such as accidents, theft, fire, natural calamities, and third party liabilities. It helps cover repair or replacement costs and ensures legal compliance, giving you peace of mind while driving. Car insurance typically includes Third Party Cover, Own Damage Cover, or a Comprehensive Policy combining both.

Key Benefits of Four Wheeler Insurance:

• Legal Compliance - Third party car insurance is mandatory as per Indian motor vehicle laws.
• Protection Against Accident Damages - Covers repair or replacement costs for damages to your car due to accidents or collisions.
• Third Party Liability Coverage - Provides financial protection against injuries, death, or property damage caused to third parties.
• Theft & Fire Coverage - Safeguards you against financial loss due to vehicle theft, fire, or explosion.
• Natural & Man Made Calamity Cover - Protects against floods, earthquakes, storms, riots, and vandalism.
• Personal Accident Cover - Offers compensation in case of death or permanent disability of the owner driver.
• Add On Covers for Enhanced Protection - Options like Zero Depreciation, Engine Protection, Roadside Assistance, and NCB Protection.
• Cashless Repairs Network - Enables hassle free repairs at network garages without upfront payments.
